page_title: Attack on Titan: Humanity in Chains
text:
is an action game developed by for the , released in Japan on December 5, 2013. It was released on May 12, 2015 in North America by as an eShop exclusive, and on July 2, 2015 in Europe for the Nintendo eShop.

Story

The game follows the story of the anime, beginning from the year 845 when the Colossal and Armored Titan first attacked and demolished Wall Maria. The player controls Eren at first, but as the game progresses, Mikasa, Armin, and other members of the Scout Regiment become playable characters. The game ends on the point where Season 1 of the anime ends.

World Mode

World Mode, which you can unlock after helping Eren seal the gate in the Trost District, is a mode where the player creates a character that enlists in the Scout Regiment, the player can buy gear, invest and upgrade facilities, develop equipment, and go on various missions. More cosmetic items and accessories to wear become available as the Story Mode progresses.

DLC

Later, DLC for the game was released, of which 2 more character episodes were added. One follows Captain Levi, and the other follows Sasha Blouse.

The DLC was included for free in Jinrei Saigo no Tsubasa CHAIN as well as the worldwide release.

Trivia

Although the game was fully released in English, it was taken off the American Nintendo e-shop at one point.
